LanguageData.MyMod_Joywire.label: HappyChip
LanguageData.MyMod_Joywire.description: Implant permanent happiness stimulation in the brain.
LanguageData.MyMod_InstallJoywire.label: Install HappyChip
LanguageData.MyMod_SuperRifle.label: Flying Tigers Super Rifle
LanguageData.MyMod_SuperRifle.description: An advanced assault rifle chambered in 7.62x39mm Soviet, featuring high accuracy and reliability.
LanguageData.AmmoSet_SuperBarrett.label: Super Barrett
LanguageData.Ammo_SuperBarrett.label: Super Barrett Cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_SuperBarrett.description: Super Barrett ammunition - extremely powerful anti-materiel round.
LanguageData.Bullet_SuperBarrett.label: Super Barrett Bullet
LanguageData.FT_SuperRifle.label: Flying Tigers Super Rifle
LanguageData.FT_SuperRifle.description: An experimental directed energy weapon that fires supercharged plasma bolts. Infinite ammo capacity.
